title: RC4614 GST/HST Attribution Point Election or Revocation of the Election for a Selected Listed Financial Institution - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4614 GST/HST Attribution Point Election or Revocation of the Election for a Selected Listed Financial Institution
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this form if you are a selected listed financial institution (SLFI) that is a stratified investment plan or an investment plan and you want to make or revoke an attribution point election under section 18 of the Selected Listed Financial Institutions Attribution Method (GST/HST) Regulations (SLFI Regulations) to have attribution points for the purposes of Part 2 of the SLFI Regulations for a series of the stratified investment plan or for the investment plan that are quarterly, monthly, weekly or daily.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4614-fill-23e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (rc4614-fill-23e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (rc4614-23e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (rc4614-23e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
